name: skills-master-monorepo
description: Tool-agnostic Apple & Android development skills, installable into any AI coding tool.

scripts.skills:registry: pnpm --filter @ichintansoni/skills-master exec tsx src/bin.ts registry build --content ../../skills
scripts.skills:marketplace: pnpm --filter @ichintansoni/skills-master exec tsx src/bin.ts marketplace build --content ../../skills --out ../..
